tool_args.label: B46 Select Bus Service - Community Board 17 Presentation

payload.title: B46 Select Bus Service
payload.description: Presentation to Community Board 17 about the B46 Select Bus Service project on Utica Avenue, including draft service plan, street design changes, and implementation timeline.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: Proposed Select Bus Service along the Utica Avenue B46 corridor. Includes draft service plan for B46 SBS and B46 local, street design changes, bus lanes, left-turn bays/restrictions, transit signal priority, bus bulbs, real-time passenger information, and improved station amenities.
B46 Local service generally travels between Kings Plaza and DeKalb Ave
B46 LTD generally travels between Kings Plaza and Williamsburg Bridge Plaza, makes all local stops north of DeKalb Ave and south of Ave H, and limited stops between DeKalb Ave and Ave H
Proposed Select Bus Service on Utica Avenue
The Utica Avenue B46 corridor, identified as a potential candidate for Select Bus Service in the 2009 Bus Rapid Transit Phase II Study. Second-busiest bus route in NYC.

warnings: corridor.routes is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route lists refer to route records, not corridor identity. Suggested relation: route operates_on_corridor corridor.

tool_args.label: Bus lanes Church Avenue to Fillmore Avenue (Proposed Summer 2015)

payload.location_text: Church Avenue to Fillmore Avenue, Utica Avenue, Brooklyn
payload.description: Add bus lanes, left-turn bays, turn restrictions, truck loading zones, update curb regulations

normalized_location.raw_text: Church Avenue to Fillmore Avenue, Utica Avenue, Brooklyn

payload.description: Implement transit signal priority, construct bus bulbs at SBS stations south of Eastern Parkway, add real-time passenger information, new shelters, plantings, benches, curb extensions, pedestrian islands, high-visibility crosswalks, resurface Utica Avenue

Outreach for Select Bus Service including Community Advisory Committee Meeting #1 (September 2014), Public Workshop #1 (November 2014), Community Advisory Committee Meeting #2 (February 2015), Open House (March 2015), Community Board Meetings (March-April 2015)

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

payload.description: Implemented bus lanes, left-turn bays, and turn restrictions on Utica Avenue from St. Johns Place to Church Avenue
Launch B46 Select Bus Service in September, including implementation plan, new street markings, and fare machine installation
